name: SAMA KW1000 Wired RGB Custom Mechanical Gaming PC Keyboard

Featuring OUTEMU mechanical switches , RGB backlighting with 20 modes, and USB Type-C connectivity , this keyboard ensures responsive feedback and vibrant lighting
Compact and programmable, it’s an excellent gaming keyboard for laptops or PCs, built with durable ABS material
Ideal for gamers needing a reliable, portable, and custom mechanical gaming keyboard for seamless gameplay
